goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should be in the type of 'hotel'.
The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should be in the 'west'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '3 people' and '3 nights' starting from 'saturday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should be on 'the same day as the hotel booking' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should 'arrive by 16:30' and should depart from 'norwich'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 'the same group of people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should be in the type of hotel
The hotel should include free wifi and should be in the west
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 3 people and 3 nights starting from saturday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should be on the same day as the hotel booking and should go to cambridge
The train should arrive by 16:30 and should depart from norwich
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
